CustomField.description: Federal agency responsible for issuing this permit or authorization (e.g., USACE, EPA, USFWS, FERC). Populated from RegulatoryAuthorizationType.IssuingDepartmentId at record creation. Used by the nepaPermitDependencies LWC for agency badge display.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Federal agency responsible for issuing this permit (e.g., USACE, EPA, USFWS).
CustomField.label: Lead Agency
